_meta.description: Navigo-chosen status parameters. Proposed defaults pending confirmation by ZH before go-live (SPEC.md section 3). Every threshold is an independent Navigo construction from public data; none is inherited from any third party.

yield_curve_10y3m.elevated_rule: Spread at or above zero within elevated_window_months after the end of a sustained inversion (a run of at least sustained_inversion_min_observations consecutive daily observations below zero).
